events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

diaries.text:
**Storm Mar** (air/artisan) — Year 66

The air in me stirs with possibility.

A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.
Sheltered underground for days.

*— Storm Mar, artisan*

**Clay Kai** (air/sentinel) — Year 66

Another year. We are still here.

A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.
Sheltered underground for days.

*— Clay Kai, sentinel*
